lines.original: Tak ada sore dan udara menjadi segar
lines.translation: There is no afternoon and the air is fresh

lines.original: Tak ada gelap, lalu mata enggan menatap
lines.translation: There is no darkness, then the eyes refuse to look

lines.original: Tak ada bintang mati, butiran pasir terbang ke langit
lines.translation: There are no dead stars, grains of sand fly into the sky

lines.original: Tak ada fajar hanya remang malam
lines.translation: There is no dawn, only the dimness of night
Everything is gone up to the sun
The fragrance of roses kills the moon
That's why I'm looking for you
Give me your hand to shake

lines.original: Yang kau tinggalkan hanya harum tubuhmu
lines.translation: All you leave behind is your body fragrance

lines.original: Berikan suaramu, balas semua bisikanku memanggil namamu
lines.translation: Give your voice, reply to all my whispers calling your name

lines.original: Atau kau ingin aku berteriak sekencang kencangnya
lines.translation: Or do you want me to scream as loud as I can?

lines.original: Agar seluruh ruangan ini bergetar oleh suara ku
lines.translation: So that the whole room vibrates with my voice
